author: varunneal
name: Peer-LoRA Ensemble
technique_summary: PR #2014 stack with peer-LoRA ensemble: after per-doc LoRA training, run K-1 peer forwards and blend on uncertain tokens (entropy >= 0.5) in probability space (K=3, w=0.8). Tuned TTT LR=0.00015, WD=0.25.

attribution.mixture_of_models_ensembling: inspired by Slowrun techniques from @akshayvegesna and others
